title: Excalibur | Nemo´s Woodcutter Support
body: This is a texturepack update: it adds the Woodcutter to the Excalibur texturepack.This is a support texturepack that adds the Woodcutter from Nemo’s Woodcutter mod into the Excalibur texturepack, ensuring all textures match Excalibur’s style and look consistent in-game.
